case_title: DIMENSION HILL FOODS INC. VS. TASTE LABS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE AND MISPRINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIMENSION HILL FOODS INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-07-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TASTE  LABS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,359.20 FILED BY DIMENSION HILL FOODS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TASTE  LABS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIMENSION HILL FOODS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TASTE  LABS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2015 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-15-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-28-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-15-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
